characters.name: KARU
characters.description: Väike pruun karu, pehme karvaga, kandmas sooja punast salli. Tal on suured sõbralikud silmad ja naeratav nägu. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: ORAV
characters.description: Väike hall orav, koheva sabaga, kandmas sooja sinist mütsi. Tal on säravad uudishimulikud silmad ja rõõmus näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: LUMINE ÕU
locations.description: A sunny, open snowy backyard with tall, snow-covered pine trees in the background. The ground is covered in deep, white snow. A small, gentle slope is visible on one side. The sky is bright blue. Cartoon style, cheerful winter atmosphere.

pages.scene: Karu, wearing a red scarf, and Orav, wearing a blue hat, are standing in a sunny, open snowy backyard. They are looking around, smiling. Deep white snow covers the ground. Snow-covered pine trees are in the background.

Karu (red scarf) and Orav (blue hat) are looking at the vast expanse of deep white snow in the sunny backyard. Karu points excitedly at the snow with one paw, Orav claps his front paws together with joy. Snow-covered pine trees are in the background.

Karu (red scarf) and Orav (blue hat) are standing together in the snowy backyard. Karu makes a large gesture with his paws, indicating a big structure. Orav looks determined and nods, ready to start building. They are planning their snow fort.

Karu (red scarf) and Orav (blue hat) are actively digging and gathering snow into a pile in the sunny backyard. Karu uses his paws to push a large amount of snow, while Orav uses his front paws to scoop smaller amounts. A growing mound of snow is forming.

Karu (red scarf) and Orav (blue hat) are patting down the snow, shaping it into a wall. Karu is using his whole body to press and compact a large section of snow. Orav is carefully patting a smaller, distinct section of the growing snow wall. A low, thick snow wall is visible in the backyard.

Karu (red scarf) and Orav (blue hat) stand proudly next to their nearly finished, tall snow fort with thick, sturdy walls in the sunny backyard. The fort is impressive and reaches their shoulders. They are smiling widely, looking at their creation with immense satisfaction.

Karu (red scarf) and Orav (blue hat) are inside the completed snow fort, playfully peeking out from behind its walls. Karu is looking out, smiling, while Orav is playfully hiding slightly behind Karu. They are enjoying their new fort in the snowy backyard.

Karu (red scarf) and Orav (blue hat) are sitting comfortably side-by-side inside their finished snow fort, leaning against the snow wall. They are both smiling widely and look content and happy with their creation. The sunny backyard is visible outside the fort.
